Tuberculosis Screening 
To use the sharing features on this page, please enable JavaScript. 
What is a tuberculosis (TB) screening test? 
A tuberculosis screening test checks to see if you have the bacteria (germs) that cause tuberculosis (TB) in your body. TB is a bacterial infection Â that mainly attacks the lungs. But it can also affect other parts of the body, including the brain, spine, and kidneys.
TB germs cause two types of conditions:
Inactive
